problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: Combining Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
